query:
SELECT ptc.id, ptc.stationCode, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, ptc.subtypeCode, ptc.dailyTargetQty, ptc.baseUnitPoints, ptc.effectiveFrom, ptc.effectiveTo, ptc.active, ptc.createdAt, ptc.updatedAt
FROM productivity_target_configs ptc
INNER JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = ptc.categoryId
WHERE ptc.stationCode IN ('C','E')
  AND pc.categoryName = '智慧型手機'
  AND pc.brandName = 'Apple'
ORDER BY ptc.stationCode, ptc.id DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT ptc.id, ptc.stationCode, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, ptc.subtypeCode, ptc.dailyTargetQty, ptc.baseUnitPoints, ptc.effectiveFrom, ptc.effectiveTo, ptc.active, ptc.createdAt, ptc.updatedAt
FROM productivity_target_configs ptc
INNER JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = ptc.categoryId
WHERE ptc.stationCode IN ('C','E')
  AND pc.categoryName = '智慧型手機'
  AND pc.brandName = 'Apple'
ORDER BY ptc.stationCode, ptc.id DESC;
